suspected_cause: Models detect fail-open ACCT reset and JTAG unlock lock clearing, but miss plain reset-disabled reglocks and unprotected CLINT path.
evidence_excerpt: No finding cites reglk_mem reset to zero as default-lock-disabled case or CLINT bridge without acc_ctrl_c gate.
impact_on_engineer: Important reset-default and CLINT protection gaps remain unreported.
